Detection Pattern Definitions for Auto-Annotation

Source: R/detection_patterns.R
detection_patterns.Rd

Internal data structures defining patterns for detecting inputs, outputs, and dependencies in source code files across different programming languages.

Developed by Philipp Thoss.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
